reviews.text: I don’t think I can say enough about how great our wedding Photographer was!! We live out of state and he did a meet and greet over video call, he asked what we were wanting and we got exactly that, he made the process so easy! He met us in Estes Park Colorado in the Rocky Mountain National Park at Sprague lake. My husband and I have never done any professional pictures before but Mark knew how to direct us perfectly. If you’re looking for a photographer in the area or just one in general I highly recommend looking into Mark! Thanks again Mark! You’re amazing!!

Long story short: Book with Mark—you won’t regret it! He’s incredibly easy to work with, always understanding, and adapts seamlessly to whatever scenery or vibe you’re aiming for. Neither my husband nor I are models, but Mark made us feel completely comfortable in front of the camera. His talent for capturing natural, beautiful moments shines through in his editing—everything looked polished without being overdone.

We had so much fun during our engagement shoot, and even more on our wedding day! Mark was discreet and made the whole experience feel effortless and natural. Plus, he's affordable and flexible, which made the entire process even better. We’re beyond thankful to have had such a fantastic photographer to capture one of the most important seasons of our lives!

Mark surpassed all our expectations with his remarkable work on both our engagement and wedding photos! From the very beginning, his communication and responsiveness were truly outstanding, making the entire wedding planning process smooth and stress-free. On our special day, Mark's talent and expertise truly shone through as he effortlessly captured every single precious moment. We were amazed to hear from several guests who said, "He seemed to be everywhere the entire night!" Despite the challenging weather conditions, with gusts reaching 50mph, Mark rose to the occasion and managed to capture some absolutely breathtaking photos. His ability to seize those incredible moments amidst the wind is a testament to his skill and dedication. We are beyond grateful for Mark's outstanding work and can't help but relive our wedding day through his stunning photography.

We really enjoyed working with Mark, he was a comfortable presence to have around and our photos turned out beautifully. I think he did an excellent job of telling the story of our wedding, and I loved looking through the gallery and getting to re-live that very special day and experience all of the emotions running through our guests as well. We have received SO MANY compliments on our beautiful photographs, and several people have commented that they look like they should be in a magazine. We highly recommend Mark, both for the beautiful photographs and because he is very kind and enjoyable and easy to have around when emotions are running high. He put us both at ease, and did an excellent job capturing the feelings and experience of the whole day. He was very responsive and attentive to questions and concerns before and after the wedding, which we really appreciated.

Mark, you have been on my list!! Nolan and I are both SO pleased with our photos. For being as cold as it was, these turned out excellent. Thank you for capturing this shocking moment in such a stunning place. We will  absolutely recommend you to everyone we know in Colorado who may need a wedding photographer :) Thank you again!!!
